display.purpose: Approval *what* headline only — imperative, present tense.

metaCaps.purpose: Section eyebrows: REQUESTING, TOOL, risk-tier label.

shadows.name: success-wash
shadows.purpose: Atmospheric green sweep on approve. Translates from translateY(200) to translateY(0) over 200ms, fades over 600ms. Not a box-shadow.

shadows.name: toast-lift
shadows.purpose: Toasts rise from the thumb zone. No box-shadow.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Single ease-out-quint curve for every transition. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Tab fade, small state changes, hold-to-confirm rewind, toast exit.

motion.name: deny-shake
motion.purpose: Deny micro-shake on the entire screen.

motion.name: countdown-ring
motion.purpose: Strokes the brand-teal arc from full to zero.

haptics.name: arrive
haptics.purpose: Approval entrance — soft buzz, not a startle.

components.name: Approve Button
components.description: Primary action on the approval surface. Always preceded by biometric.
components.css: .ds-btn-approve { background: #2cb567; color: #04230f; padding: 20px 24px; border-radius: 16px; border: none; font-family: 'Geist-Medium', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 24px; flex: 1.4; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-approve:hover { background: #208c50; } .ds-btn-approve:active { background: #208c50; }

components.name: Deny Button
components.description: Single-tap deny. Opens optional reason sheet.
components.css: .ds-btn-deny { background: #162026; color: #eef4f6; padding: 20px 24px; border-radius: 16px; border: none; font-family: 'Geist-Medium', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 24px; flex: 1; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-deny:hover { background: #1f2c33; } .ds-btn-deny:active { background: #1f2c33; }

components.name: Risk Band (High)
components.description: Status band on the approval card. Background carries severity; text color is paired.
components.html:
HIGH IMPACT
Deletes data. Reversible within 30 days.
components.css: .ds-band-risk-high { background: #d94a3d; color: #fff5f3; padding: 16px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Geist-Regular', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-band-eyebrow { font-family: 'Geist-SemiBold', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 14px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-band-summary { font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Details Card (Tool + JSON)
components.description: Collapsible card pairing a Meta-Caps eyebrow with a Mono primary value.
components.css: .ds-card-details { background: #162026; border: 1px solid #2b3940; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; color: #eef4f6; } .ds-card-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; } .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'Geist-SemiBold', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 14px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b7d83; } .ds-mono { font-family: 'GeistMono-Medium', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; margin-top: 4px; color: #eef4f6; } .ds-toggle { font-family: 'Geist-Medium', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px; letter-spacing: 0.1px; color: #a8b8be; }

components.name: Countdown Ring
components.description: 56px brand-teal arc on a Surface-3 track, linear from full to zero over the request lifetime.
components.html: <svg class="ds-ring" width="56" height="56" viewBox="0 0 56 56"><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="26.5" fill="none" stroke="#1f2c33" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="26.5" fill="none" stroke="#1c8a9e" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="166.5" stroke-dashoffset="55" stroke-linecap="round" transform="rotate(-90 28 28)"/></svg>

components.name: Hold to Confirm
components.description: Press-and-hold control for recursive self-approval. Brand-teal fill animates left-to-right over 5s.
components.css: .ds-hold { position: relative; height: 56px; border-radius: 16px; background: #162026; border: 1px solid #1c8a9e; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-hold-fill { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; background: #1c8a9e; opacity: 0.35; transition: width 5000ms linear; } .ds-hold-label { position: relative; font-family: 'Geist-Medium', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: #eef4f6; }

components.name: Toast (Approve)
components.description: Bottom-anchored toast. Slides up + fades in 240ms, holds 1800ms, exits 180ms.
components.html: Approved · Delete 4 devices in Acme Corp.
components.css: .ds-toast-approve { background: #2cb567; color: #04230f; padding: 16px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Geist-Medium', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; }

components.name: Reason Input
components.description: Multiline reason input inside the deny-reason bottom sheet.
components.css: .ds-input-reason { background: #162026; color: #eef4f6; padding: 16px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; min-height: 88px; font-family: 'Geist-Regular', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; resize: none; } .ds-input-reason::placeholder { color: #6b7d83; } .ds-input-reason:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #1c8a9e; outline-offset: 0; }

narrative.overview: Breeze Mobile is the security identity that makes high-tier AI agent actions safe. Its load-bearing moment is the 11:47pm buzz — owner of a 30-tech MSP glances at their phone, reads a request, trusts it's real, taps once. Every other surface (AI chat, fleet status, alerts) is ambient. The system rejects the visual register of generic mobile SaaS: no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no neon-on-dark, no candy palettes. It also rejects the cold, default look of stock React Native: Geist replaces system sans, brand-tinted neutrals replace pure greys, and color is committed to a single cool teal anchor with strict status semantics.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-canonical, light supported. The 11:47pm scene drives the default.
One color carries the surface (Committed strategy). Brand teal anchors. Status colors are reserved for status.
Geist sans + GeistMono. The mono carries arguments and tool names; the sans carries everything else.
Spacious rows over dense cards. Cards appear when something demands focus.
Motion is one curve, five durations. Variance lives in the curve, not the speed.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Brand teal carries identity, never status. If a chip is teal, it's a brand affordance (link, focus, pulse). If something needs to mean good or bad, use approve green or deny red. Never substitute brand for status to tone things down.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff. Every neutral is brand-hue tinted (chroma 0.005–0.012). The dark surface ramp is canonical at 200° hue.

rules.name: The 200° Hue Rule
rules.body: The brand and all neutrals share hue 200. Status colors hold their own hue (145, 25, 75) by design, so semantic intent reads instantly across the surface.

rules.name: The Imperative Headline Rule
rules.body: Approval display copy is imperative, present tense, plain English. Display type earns its size through directness, not length.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Verbatim Rule
rules.body: Anything quoted from the underlying API (tool names, arguments, request IDs) is rendered in GeistMono so it visually marks itself as machine-truth, not editorial copy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No box-shadow on cards, buttons, or sheets. Hierarchy comes from the surface ramp.

rules.name: The No-Glassmorphism Rule
rules.body: No backdrop-filter, no decorative blurs. The sheet scrim is a flat rgba(0,0,0,0.55), intentional and dim, never blurred.

rules.name: The Asymmetric Pair Rule
rules.body: Approve is always larger and right-anchored (flex 1.4). Deny is smaller and left-anchored (flex 1). The asymmetry is the design — approving requires more deliberate thumb travel.

dos: Do anchor every screen on Surface 0 (#0a1014) in dark mode. Step up the ramp for cards, never sideways into a different hue.
Do use Geist for every label, headline, and body string. GeistMono for every value rendered verbatim from the API.
Do reserve approve green for healthy / approve, deny red for deny / critical, amber for warning. One semantic, one color.
Do use the brand teal (#1c8a9e) for identity affordances — countdown ring, focus, pulses, links — never for status.
Do animate with Easing.bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) (ease-out-quint) at one of five durations: 180 / 240 / 320 / 400 / 280ms.
Do keep the asymmetric button pair: approve flex 1.4, deny flex 1. Approve right, deny left.
Do use rounded.lg (16px) on actionable surfaces, rounded.md (10px) on info cards and bands, rounded.xl (24px) on sheets.
Do label section eyebrows in Meta Caps (11px, +1.0 letter-spacing). REQUESTING. TOOL. LOW IMPACT.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff. Pure black and pure white never appear in this system. Use #0a1014 or #eef4f6.
Don't use generic Tailwind / Material status hex (#dc2626, #3b82f6, #22c55e). They violate the 200°-hue tinted-neutral rule and read as AI-generated.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use glassmorphism / backdrop-filter / decorative blurs.
Don't use box-shadow for elevation. Step the surface ramp instead.
Don't apologize in copy. Plain noun + verb, present tense.
Don't use em dashes in copy or --. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, parentheses.
Don't write gerund chains (Loading your devices...). Use Loading. or skeletons.
Don't put status meaning on the brand teal. Healthy in teal reads as a system tell.
Don't add bounce, elastic, or spring physics to motion. Ease-out-quint, every time.
Don't ship modals as a first thought. Inline progressive disclosure preferred.
Don't introduce new typography sizes outside the nine-step scale. Variance is in weight and family pairing.
Don't use system fonts as a fallback in production. Geist must be loaded; system-ui is a degraded path.
